LanguageData.Gun_HellcatRifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.Gun_HellcatRifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Gun_HellcatRifle.tools.2.label: muzzle
LanguageData.Gun_Incinerator.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.Gun_Incinerator.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Gun_Incinerator.tools.2.label: muzzle
LanguageData.Gun_HellcatRifle.description: A versatile assault rifle with a shortened barrel, trading range and stopping power for decreased weight and bulk.\n\nIt also comes equipped with a hardened, bioferrite mini-burner capable of setting nearby targets ablaze with a stream of burning accelerant.
LanguageData.Gun_Incinerator.description: A heavy weapon with a hardened bioferrite housing that can spray a stream of flame into an area.\n\nThe weapon also comes equipped with a pressure control module, allowing the wielder to set a small area ablaze with a concentrated spray of fuel.
LanguageData.Gun_Incinerator.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
